headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Ulta Beauty (ULTA) After This Year’s Price Pullback?
summary: For investors wondering whether Ulta Beauty, at around US$515 per share, still offers value or whether the easy money has already been made, this article breaks down what the current price might be implying. The stock is up 4.2% over the last week, even after a decline of 7.8% over the past month and a 16.9% pullback year to date, while still sitting on a 26.5% gain over the past year and 49.1% over five years. Recent coverage has focused on how Ulta Beauty fits within the Specialty Retail...
